offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed invoice generation causes late orders. We streamline invoice generation instead of manual invoice creation and tracking.
problem: Timely invoice generation and accounts payable management
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try Simple invoice template creation and Basic expense tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
